GameKey.description: A 9 digit unique code identifying the game that this record corresponds to. The GameID is composed of Season; SeasonType; Week and HomeTeam. Note: This value will be NULL for bye weeks

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this game corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=All-Star).

Season.description: The NFL season of the game

Week.description: The NFL week of the game (regular season: 1 to 18; preseason: 0 to 4; postseason: 1 to 4). Note: seasons after 2021 will have only 3 preseason weeks

Date.description: The date and time of the game (in US Eastern Time)

AwayTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key} of the away team

HomeTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the home team

AwayScore.description: The final score of the Away Team

HomeScore.description: The final score of the Home Team

Channel.description: The television station broadcasting the game

PointSpread.description: The oddsmaker point spread at game start from the perspective of the team (negative numbers indicate the HomeTeam is favored; positive numbers indicate the AwayTeam is favored)

OverUnder.description: The total points line (over/under) at game start

Quarter.description: The current quarter of the game (1, 2, 3, 4, HALF, OT, F, F/OT or NULL if game has not yet started)

TimeRemaining.description: The amount of time remaining in the current quarter (e.g. 11:23; 5:34; NULL if game is not in progress or at halftime)

Possession.description: The team that currently has possession of the ball (Ex. PHI; NE; NULL if game is not in progress or at halftime)

Down.description: The current down in the game (1, 2, 3, 4 or NULL)

Distance.description: The yards to go for a first down (this can be any positive number or "Goal")

YardLine.description: the yard line of the ball's current position on the field as of the most recently completed play

YardLineTerritory.description: The team's side of the field that the ball is on when the play occurred

RedZone.description: The team abbreviation [Key] that currently has the ball in the opponent's red zone (Ex: "SF"; "BAL" or NULL)

AwayScoreQuarter1.description: Points scored by the away team in Quarter 1

AwayScoreQuarter2.description: Points scored by the away team in Quarter 2

AwayScoreQuarter3.description: Points scored by the away team in Quarter 3

AwayScoreQuarter4.description: Points scored by the away team in Quarter 4

AwayScoreOvertime.description: Points scored by the away team in overtime

HomeScoreQuarter1.description: Points scored by the home team in Quarter 1

HomeScoreQuarter2.description: Points scored by the home team in Quarter 2

HomeScoreQuarter3.description: Points scored by the home team in Quarter 3

HomeScoreQuarter4.description: Points scored by the home team in Quarter 4

HomeScoreOvertime.description: Points scored by the home team in overtime

IsInProgress.description: Whether the game is currently in progress (true/false)

IsOvertime.description: Whether this game went into overtime

DownAndDistance.description: The description of the down and distance for display purposes

QuarterDescription.description: Description of the current quarter for display purposes

StadiumID.description: The unique ID of the team's current home stadium

LastUpdated.description: The date and time that this game was last updated (in US Eastern Time)

GeoLat.description: The geographic latitude coordinate of the venue where the game is taking place

GeoLong.description: The geographic longitude coordinate of the venue where the game is taking place

ForecastTempLow.description: The forecasted low temperature on game day at this venue (Fahrenheit)

ForecastTempHigh.description: The forecasted high temperature on game day at this venue (Fahrenheit)

ForecastDescription.description: The forecast description on game day at this venue.

ForecastWindChill.description: The forecasted wind chill on game day at this venue.

ForecastWindSpeed.description: The forecasted wind speed on game day at this venue.

AwayTeamMoneyLine.description: The sportsbook's moneyline for the away team

HomeTeamMoneyLine.description: The sportsbook's moneyline for the home team

Canceled.description: Indicates whether the game was canceled

Closed.description: Indicates whether the game is over and the final score has been verified and closed out. Note: it is recommend for bet resulting to use IsClosed = True rather than simply Final game status

LastPlay.description: The description of the most recent play/event of the game. Note: This is for display purposes and does not include corresponding data points

Day.description: The date of the game (in US Eastern Time)

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game (in US Eastern Time)

AwayTeamID.description: The unique ID of the away team

HomeTeamID.description: The unique ID of the home team

GlobalGameID.description: A globally unique ID for this game. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalAwayTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for the away team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalHomeTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for the home team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

PointSpreadAwayTeamMoneyLine.description: The payout on the away team's spread

PointSpreadHomeTeamMoneyLine.description: The payout on the home team's spread

StadiumDetails.description: The details of the stadium where this game is played

Status.description: The status of the game. For a description of possible values, see here. For how suspended and postponed games are handled specifically, see here.

GameEndDateTime.description: The date and time of when the game officially ended. Note: This field is populated after the game and score are finalized

HomeRotationNumber.description: Rotation number of home team in this game

AwayRotationNumber.description: Rotation number of away team in this game

NeutralVenue.description: Indicates whether this game is played in a neutral venue

RefereeID.description: The unique ID of the head referee

OverPayout.description: The sportsbook's payout for over the total points line

UnderPayout.description: The sportsbook's payout for the under

HomeTimeouts.description: The number of timeouts remaining for the Home Team

AwayTimeouts.description: The number of timeouts remaining for the Away Team

DateTimeUTC.description: The date and time of the game (in UTC)

Attendance.description: The total attendance for the game

IsClosed.description: Indicates whether the game is over and the final score has been verified and closed out.
